# TRAKK

> TRAKK is a technical outdoor sock company based in Edmonton, Alberta,
> Canada. We make merino wool trail socks designed for hiking, camping,
> trail running, and everyday wear. Our socks are designed in Edmonton and
> made in Canada. Our first product, the Elk Island Sock ($32 CAD), features
> a geographically accurate knit map of the lakes of Elk Island National
> Park, just east of Edmonton. The company is led by Jack, Chief Adventure
> Officer, an orange tabby cat.

Key facts:

- Based in Edmonton, Alberta. Products designed in Edmonton, made in Canada.
- Socks are a merino wool blend: temperature-regulating, moisture-wicking,
  odor-resistant. Suitable for hiking, camping, running, and Alberta winters.
- First release is a limited batch of 28 hand-numbered pairs. Each pair
  ships with a numbered card.
- Currently sold online only, shipping from Edmonton across Canada.
- Future designs will feature other Alberta parks and trails.

## Pages

- [Shop](https://www.trakk.ca/shop): Current products and availability
- [Elk Island Sock](https://www.trakk.ca/shop/elk-island-sock): Our first
  sock, the map of Elk Island National Park, $32 CAD
- [Our Story](https://www.trakk.ca/our-story): Why we started TRAKK and why
  Elk Island came first
- [FAQ](https://www.trakk.ca/faq): Materials, sizing, care instructions,
  shipping, returns, and who runs the company
- [Contact](https://www.trakk.ca/contact): Get in touch, including retail
  and wholesale inquiries
